<!--
Thanks for contributing to payments-core.

Every meaningful change in this repo is tracked through an OpenSpec proposal
under `openspec/changes/<change-name>/`. Link the change your PR applies below
so reviewers can cross-reference scope, design, and tasks.
-->

## OpenSpec change

<!-- Example: openspec/changes/repo-bootstrap/ -->

- Change: `openspec/changes/<change-name>/`
- Linear issue: `DOJ-XXXX`

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets describing what this PR does and why. Focus on intent, not diff. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Matches the `proposal.md` scope (no drift).
- [ ] Matches the `design.md` layout (no unapproved structural changes).
- [ ] Tasks in `tasks.md` are checked off (or explicitly deferred with a note).

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm install` clean on a fresh clone.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` green.
- [ ] `pnpm build` green (emits `dist/` as expected).
- [ ] `pnpm test` green (or the documented zero-test exit).
- [ ] CI workflow green on this PR.

## Out of scope

<!-- Anything that could be confused as part of this PR but is deferred to another change. -->

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything Greptile / CodeRabbit / human reviewers should focus on. -->
